title: Speculative Decoding for Robot Diffusion Policies
description: Ports speculative decoding (vLLM/Medusa/EAGLE) from LLM serving to robot diffusion policies. A 4.5k-param MLP draft and the 263M-param lerobot/diffusion_pusht verifier are gated by an action-difference threshold tau. Across 3 episodes of pusht: mean 2.2x speedup, mean 51% MLP acceptance, +8.9% action MSE -- consistently hitting the 10 Hz / 100 ms deadline that pure diffusion misses. Includes a serving Pareto, adaptive denoising (EAGLE analogue), cross-episode validation, and an interactive tau slider that recolors the served trajectory live.
